name: Kate's Kiss Off Chocolate Peanut Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust, crush the wafers and press into a greased 9-inch pie pan evenly on the bottom and sides.
2. For the filling, whip cream cheese until fluffy. Slowly mix in sugar, peanut butter, and melted butter. Whip cream and vanilla until firm. Blend 1/3 cup of whipped cream into the peanut butter mixture. Fold this into the remaining whipped cream until fully blended. Fill the pie shell, smooth the top, and chill in the freezer for at least 20 minutes.
3. For the topping, combine all ingredients except optional ones and melt in a double boiler until chocolate melts. Cool slightly. Spread on cooled peanut butter filling, starting from the center and working outwards. Chill or freeze until ready to serve.
4. If desired, decorate with crushed peanuts and white/dark chocolate shavings before serving.
